title: Police Station Cover for Criminal Defence Firms in Kent and Medway
primaryKeyword: police station cover Kent Medway firms
metaTitle: Police Station Cover Kent and Medway Firms
metaDescription: Police station agent cover for criminal defence firms across Kent and Medway — custody, voluntary interviews, and attendance notes.
contentHtml:
In brief

Criminal defence firms instruct police station agents for custody at North Kent (Gravesend) and Tonbridge, and for voluntary interviews across Kent.

North Kent and Tonbridge custody

North Kent custody at Gravesend (Thames Way, Northfleet) covers north Kent including Dartford. Tonbridge is west Kent's main 24-hour custody suite. See Gravesend cover and Tonbridge cover.

Voluntary interviews across Kent

Voluntary interviews are common at Sevenoaks, Tunbridge Wells, Maidstone and Swanley. We provide cover by instruction. See West Kent area hub and Sevenoaks cover.

Instructing cover

Telephone for urgent custody. Include client details, station, custody record and DSCC reference. Text 07535 494446 if unable to call. Police station cover for solicitors.

General information only.

faq.q: Do you cover both Legal Aid and private clients?
faq.a: Firms instruct for both; confirm billing and scheme requirements when instructing.

author: Robert Cashman
